theme_and_archetype.description: A highly immersive, stylized 3D animation look (Spider-Verse inspired) mixed with gritty NYC underground aesthetic. A dark mode base offset by warm incandescent light, glowing neon highlights, and graffiti accents.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-mono font-bold

special_treatments.comic_heading: Add a slight text-shadow or offset layer to simulate misregistered print/halftone on major hero headings.
special_treatments.code_blocks: Use JetBrains Mono, strict styling with brutalist borders.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Asymmetric, overlapping organic grids for marketing. High density but structurally rigid 'control room' grid for the workspace.
layout_and_spacing.workspace_wrapper: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden flex bg-obsidian_black relative
layout_and_spacing.whiteboard_container: rounded-2xl border-2 border-whiteboard_edge bg-whiteboard_panel shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] overflow-hidden

hero_section.description: Full-viewport fixed section containing the subway background image. It uses Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform.
hero_section.interaction: As user scrolls down, the entire scene scales up massively (e.g., scale: 1 to 30) with the transform origin anchored perfectly to the laptop screen in the image. Once the laptop screen fills the viewport, opacity fades to reveal the actual App Workspace.
elements: Male protagonist hero image as base layer.
Spinning vinyl record absolutely positioned at bottom right, rotating continuously via CSS.

magnetic_dock.interaction: On hover over an icon, it scales up, pushing neighbors slightly (framer-motion or CSS scale with sibling combinators). Active state has a glowing neon_cyan dot below the icon.

collapsible_sidebar.description: Left-aligned glassmorphic sidebar for Collections > Topics > Nodes.
collapsible_sidebar.styling: w-64 h-full bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-white/10.
collapsible_sidebar.interaction: Collapsible to icon-only via a toggle button. Uses 'JetBrains Mono' for node labels to feel technical.

teaching_agent_panel.description: The main stage. A massive, single-panel whiteboard/chat.
teaching_agent_panel.styling: Brutalist Black & White. Pure white or off-white background, pure black text. 2px solid black borders. A subtle halftone dot pattern in the background.
teaching_agent_panel.layout: Contains the AI structured visual lesson segments (headings, text, math, diagrams, tables).
teaching_agent_panel.ai_thinking_state: While loading, show a glowing neon magenta/cyan particle cluster overlaying the black&white canvas, breaking the monochrome rule to indicate AI activity.

prompt_input.description: Floating Claude-style input box at bottom center.
prompt_input.styling: Rounded-3xl, pure white background for contrast (or glass dark), heavy drop shadow. Right-aligned microphone button.
prompt_input.interaction: Inner glow/border animates when voice dictation is active.

collection_surfer.description: 3D perspective track browser for study materials.
collection_surfer.implementation: A container with CSS perspective (e.g., perspective: 1000px). Cards have rotateX and translateZ to look like they are receding into the distance.
collection_surfer.styling: Cards feature glowing neon borders and graffiti textures on hover.

motion_and_animations.scroll_zoom: Use Framer Motion. `const scale = useTransform(scrollY, [0, 1000], [1, 30])`. Ensure `transformOrigin` matches the laptop screen coordinates in the image.
motion_and_animations.hover_lift: Interactive cards translate-y-[-4px] with increased neon box-shadow.
motion_and_animations.thinking_particles: Animate a cluster of dots or use 'react-tsparticles' with a Spider-Verse glitch/halftone config.

media_assets.description: Subway train car interior with male protagonist in headphones
Gritty neon graffiti tunnel texture to blend into backgrounds
Abstract colorful motion blur imitating a spinning record

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='prompt-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG contrast compliance. Dark mode text must be bright enough, Whiteboard text must be pure black.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React components using Tailwind CSS.
Do NOT use HTML input elements directly; use highly customized Shadcn components for inputs, dialogs, etc.
Implement Framer Motion for the hero scroll-zoom transition; it is critical for the 'cinematic' requirement.
For the Teaching Agent whiteboard, enforce a brutalist Black & White aesthetic to contrast against the neon dark mode of the surrounding app.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use ONLY the provided URLs in the media_assets array.
